diagrams.title: HAL Architecture Layering
diagrams.description: Shows how Application code calls HAL API, which then interfaces with different microcontroller hardware
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how HAL enables portability across different microcontroller families

diagrams.title: Endianness Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of little-endian vs big-endian byte storage for a 32-bit value 0x12345678 in memory
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different architectures store multi-byte data in memory

diagrams.title: Memory Map Variations
diagrams.description: Shows different memory organizations across microcontroller families
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why memory addresses differ and require abstraction in portable code

diagrams.title: Portable Code Structure
diagrams.description: Diagram showing conditional compilation structure for multiple platforms
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how single source code supports multiple platforms through conditional compilation
